steps.description: Click on the "Custom Engine Agent" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Click on the "Weather Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "App Features Using Microsoft 365 Agents SDK" interface.
Click the "JavaScript" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Default Folder" field inside the "Workspace Folder" dialog box to select or edit the folder path.
